nasb.text: Now Joshua rose early in the morning and mustered the people, and he went up with the elders of Israel before the people to Ai.

esv.text: Joshua arose early in the morning and mustered the people and went up, he and the elders of Israel, before the people to Ai.

cnv.text: 約書亞清早起來，召集人民上艾城去，他和以色列的長老走在人民的前面。

ccb.text: 第二天清早，约书亚召集民众，与以色列的众首领率领全军前往艾城。
